S.FORM: Mike Bloomsraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1915 , ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 1, Mike Bloom, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mike Œ≤looms~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj **** , rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, mike Œ≤loom, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
